_comment: Curated supporter-venue ground truth — see supporters.atlanta.json for schema. verified:false = needs a local confirmation pass before launch.

venues.name: The Banshee
venues.note: Dorchester Irish pub and one of Boston's best-known soccer venues; opens at dawn for European fixtures, strong Liverpool/English-football following.

venues.name: Phoenix Landing
venues.note: Central Square (Cambridge) soccer institution; supporters' groups for English clubs and national teams.

venues.name: Lansdowne Pub
venues.note: Fenway Irish pub with many screens; reliable big-match viewing.
